title: Classic Ghast
description: Not Pixel Consistent Ghast and Happy Ghast
body:
This pack restores the original **64×32 Ghast texture** and also resizes the new **Happy Ghast** texture from **128×128 down to 64×64**.

The new Ghast textures were introduced in **Minecraft 1.21.6**, but this pack brings back the classic look for those who miss the old-school charm or prefer **lower-resolution mobs** that better fit with classic-style packs.

⚠️ **Note:** The textures for the harnesses used by the Happy Ghast remain unchanged.

![with](https://jubihugo.com/assets/content/images/cg/with.png) ![without](https://jubihugo.com/assets/content/images/cg/without.png)




![with-bottom](https://jubihugo.com/assets/content/images/cg/with-bottom.png) ![without-bottom](https://jubihugo.com/assets/content/images/cg/without-bottom.png)
